7 #ifndef IARCANEFEMBC_H
8 #define IARCANEFEMBC_H
9 
10 #include <arcane/ItemTypes.h>
11 #include <arcane/VariableTypedef.h>
12 #include <arcane/core/IStandardFunction.h>
13 
14 using namespace Arcane;
15 
16 namespace BC
17 {
18 
19 class IDirichletPointCondition
20 {
21  public:
22  virtual Arcane::NodeGroup getNode() =0;
23  virtual StringConstArrayView getValue() =0;
24  virtual Real getPenalty() =0;
25  virtual String getEnforceDirichletMethod() =0;
26 };
27 
28 class IDirichletBoundaryCondition
29 {
30  public:
31  virtual Arcane::FaceGroup getSurface() =0;
32  virtual StringConstArrayView getValue() =0;
33  virtual Real getPenalty() =0;
34  virtual String getEnforceDirichletMethod() =0;
35 };
36 
37 class INeumannBoundaryCondition
38 {
39  public:
40  virtual Arcane::FaceGroup getSurface() =0;
41  virtual StringConstArrayView getValue() =0;
42 };
43 
44 class ITractionBoundaryCondition
45 {
46  public:
47  virtual Arcane::FaceGroup getSurface() =0;
48  virtual StringConstArrayView getValue() =0;
49  virtual String getTractionInputFile() =0;
50 };
51 
52 class IManufacturedSolution
53 {
54  public:
55  virtual bool getManufacturedSource() =0;
56  virtual bool getManufacturedDirichlet() =0;
57  virtual Real getPenalty() =0;
58  virtual String getEnforceDirichletMethod() =0;
59  virtual ICaseFunction* getManufacturedDirichletFunction() =0;
60  virtual IStandardFunction* getManufacturedDirichletStandardFunction() =0;
61  virtual ICaseFunction* getManufacturedSourceFunction() =0;
62  virtual IStandardFunction* getManufacturedSourceStandardFunction() =0;
63 };
64 
65 class IArcaneFemBC
66 {
67  public:
68  virtual ~IArcaneFemBC() = default;
69  virtual ConstArrayView<BC::IDirichletPointCondition*> dirichletPointConditions() =0;
70  virtual ConstArrayView<BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition*> dirichletBoundaryConditions() =0;
71  virtual ConstArrayView<BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition*> neumannBoundaryConditions() =0;
72  virtual ConstArrayView<BC::ITractionBoundaryCondition*> tractionBoundaryConditions() =0;
73  virtual ConstArrayView<BC::IManufacturedSolution*> manufacturedSolutions() =0;
74  virtual String getHandler() =0;
75 };
76 
77 }
78 
79 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
80 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

82 #endif
